title: Sudamerlycaste dyeriana
taxonomy: Sudamerlycaste dyeriana is a species of orchid native to South America. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This orchid species is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Sudamerlycaste is a relatively small group of orchids, and Sudamerlycaste dyeriana is one of the species within this genus. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships among orchid species and their unique characteristics.
